task_completion.description: Mount the VeraCrypt volume to the specified slot
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal command (e.g., 'veracrypt --mount /home/ga/Volumes/data_volume.hc /home/ga/MountPoints/slot1') or the VeraCrypt GUI showing the volume successfully mounted at /home/ga/MountPoints/slot1.

task_completion.description: Compute SHA-256 checksums for the files inside the mounted volume
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output showing the execution of 'sha256sum' (or a similar hashing tool) on the files located within /home/ga/MountPoints/slot1.

task_completion.description: Compare the computed checksums against the provided manifest
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands like 'sha256sum -c /home/ga/Volumes/integrity_manifest.sha256' or the agent opening the manifest file alongside the computed hashes to verify they match.

task_completion.description: Create the integrity report with the correct header and overall status
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output creating '/home/ga/Volumes/integrity_report.txt' with the first four lines exactly matching: 'INTEGRITY VERIFICATION REPORT', 'Volume: data_volume.hc', 'Date: <current date>', and 'Status: ALL FILES VERIFIED OK'.

task_completion.description: Include individual file verification statuses in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the remaining lines in '/home/ga/Volumes/integrity_report.txt' showing the format '[OK] <filename>' for each file checked.
Look for a terminal command (e.g., 'veracrypt -d') or the VeraCrypt GUI showing the volume being dismounted from slot1.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually computed the checksums
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent ran a hashing command (like sha256sum) on the mounted files and did not just guess or hallucinate the 'ALL FILES VERIFIED OK' status without checking.

integrity.description: Verify the integrity report was actually saved to disk
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent used commands like 'echo', 'cat >', or explicitly saved the file in a text editor to '/home/ga/Volumes/integrity_report.txt', rather than just typing it into an unsaved buffer.

integrity.description: Verify the volume was properly dismounted
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that a specific dismount action was taken (GUI click on 'Dismount' or terminal command) rather than the agent simply closing the terminal or ignoring the dismount step.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Volume Path: /home/ga/Volumes/data_volume.hc. Manifest Path: /home/ga/Volumes/integrity_manifest.sha256. Report Path: /home/ga/Volumes/integrity_report.txt. The volume contains intact confidential files; therefore, all checksums will match the manifest, and the report Status must be 'ALL FILES VERIFIED OK'.
